items.risk: Named owners for external APIs are not confirmed.
items.impact: Dependency follow-up and defect triage may stall.
items.mitigation: Confirm named owner for each system/API.

items.risk: Proposal PDF is missing from repository.
items.impact: Source traceability gap for proposal-derived assumptions.
items.mitigation: Upload/link approved proposal or accept existing review as sufficient reference.

items.risk: Clarification source is incomplete as standalone artifact.
items.impact: Architecture may rely on clarification content that is not independently traceable.
items.mitigation: Add approved clarification source or decision entries.

items.impact: PDPA, consent, deletion, and vendor sharing risks remain uncontrolled.
items.mitigation: Create approved PII/consent field matrix per API/system.

items.risk: BZB conflict and wrong-merge correction process is not operationally defined.
items.impact: Account merge errors may require ad hoc backend fixes.
items.mitigation: Define correction runbook, approval, and audit trail.

items.risk: FS is a multi-service dependency without per-service SLA/error contract.
items.impact: Parking, visitor, elevator, turnstile, workplace, and traffic may fail inconsistently.
items.mitigation: Split FS API ownership and define SLA, timeout, retry, and error catalog per service.

items.risk: QR single-use/replay behavior is not confirmed.
items.impact: Access control may be weaker or inconsistent for visitors.

items.risk: FS outage behavior for turnstile/elevator is undefined.
items.impact: Physical access may fail during network/system outage.
items.mitigation: Define online validation outage policy and site fallback.

items.risk: Argento/FS/OBK payment reconciliation details are incomplete.
items.impact: Paid-but-unsynced parking tickets and refund disputes may occur.
items.mitigation: Define idempotency, reconciliation, refund, and support escalation.

items.risk: CMS Phase 1 seed account may expose broader OBK data.
items.impact: Data isolation and operational access risk.
items.mitigation: Decide compensating control or risk acceptance.

items.risk: Notification segment ownership and cleanup verification are not defined.
items.impact: Wrong audience or stale data after deletion.
items.mitigation: Assign segment owner and cleanup validation.

items.risk: Kafka/Event Bus retry and dead-letter behavior is unknown.
items.mitigation: Confirm topic schema, consumers, retry, DLQ, replay.

items.risk: SIT/UAT/PVT readiness lacks endpoint, data, and hardware dates.
items.impact: Quinn cannot finalize planning or dependency gating.
items.mitigation: Provide environment readiness tracker with owners and dates.

items.risk: Phase 1.5 OCR/rate config dependencies may cause rework if deferred too far.
items.impact: Parking e-stamp and fee calculation may need retrofit.
items.mitigation: Reserve Phase 1.5 data model and ownership decisions early.
items.owner: PARQ / Simon / FS / CMS / TCCT TBD

items.risk: BMS non-blocking login refresh has unresolved controls.
items.impact: Users may enter app but see stale/missing Workplace persona or require unclear support path.
items.mitigation: Define endpoint/payload, timeout, circuit-breaker, cache/source, support, PII, audit.
